page: Amazon Web Services r8in.8xlarge is a memory-optimized instance belonging to the r8in server family. It is powered by dedicated Intel x86_64 processors operating at a clock speed of 3.9 GHz. The instance features 32 virtual central processing units mapped to 16 physical cores, utilizing a hyperthreaded configuration with 2.0 threads per core. It is built on the AWS Nitro hypervisor architecture.

This instance is equipped with 256.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU. It does not include local storage, meaning all storage operations rely on external network-attached block storage. For network connectivity, the instance provides a baseline network bandwidth of 50 Gbps, designed to support network-intensive and Elastic Block Store optimized workloads.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the r8in.8xlarge offers a high-density memory configuration relative to its compute resources, making it suitable for memory-bound applications without the overhead of local storage hardware. The combination of dedicated Intel processing cores, high memory capacity, and 50 Gbps network bandwidth makes this instance well-suited for enterprise databases, in-memory caches, data analytics, and memory-intensive enterprise applications.
description: Amazon Web Services r8in.8xlarge is a memory-optimized instance designed for resource-intensive workloads. Powered by the AWS Nitro hypervisor, it features 32 vCPUs and 16 physical cores on a dedicated Intel x86_64 architecture running at 3.9 GHz. The instance is equipped with 256.0 GB of system memory, providing a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU. It does not include local storage, requiring network-attached storage solutions. For connectivity, it delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 50 Gbps, optimizing it for network and EBS throughput. This configuration is engineered for memory-bound applications, making it suitable for enterprise databases, in-memory caching, and large-scale data processing workloads that require substantial memory capacity and reliable network performance without the need for local physical disks.

tagline: A memory-optimized instance featuring dedicated Intel processors, high-capacity system memory, and high-speed baseline network connectivity for demanding enterprise workloads.
